introduction: In the wilds of Southern Africa, aviation takes over where roads don’t go. Extreme Airport Africa brings you into the world of high-octane, high-risk bush flying where pilots brave rough runways, wild fires and wild animals. Season One takes you behind the scenes at Southern Africa’s major airports, into the cockpits of airliners and heavy lift helicopters, and over the wilds of Kruger National Park and the Okavango Delta.Out in the bush, scientists take to the air to search for lost elephants, pilots land on dirt airstrips while baboons invade, and snakes threaten to close a major airport. Even in Johannesburg, the main aviation hub for Southern Africa, nature still makes its presence felt, as staff battle flocks of birds overrunning the runways and pilots fly through some of the most intense storms in the world. Aviation doesn’t get any more intense than this.S1 E1 - Rhino RunS1 E2 - Racing The SunS1 E3 - Sky CatS1 E4 - Tight TurnaroundS1 E5 - Fire SeasonS1 E6 - After The StormS1 E7 - Lions Above and BelowS1 E8 - Point of No ReturnSERIES PRODUCER: ALEX GOWER-JACKSONEXECUTIVE PRODUCERS: GREG CHIVERS, CHRISTIAN BROADHURST & NICK HEADPRODUCER: [Extreme Airport Africa — Rare TV (rare-tv.com)](https://www.rare-tv.com/extreme-airport-africa)
